message.content:
{
  "testcases": [
    {
      "id": "LOGIN_01",
      "title": "Valid login",
      "type": "positive",
      "steps": [
        "Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/",
        "Enter a valid username in the username field",
        "Enter a valid password in the password field",
        "Click the Login button"
      ],
      "expected": "The Products page is opened"
    },
    {
      "id": "LOGIN_02",
      "title": "Invalid password",
      "type": "negative",
      "steps": [
        "Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/",
        "Enter a valid username in the username field",
        "Enter an invalid password in the password field",
        "Click the Login button"
      ],
      "expected": "An error message is shown for invalid password"
    },
    {
      "id": "LOGIN_03",
      "title": "Invalid username",
      "type": "negative",
      "steps": [
        "Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/",
        "Enter an invalid username in the username field",
        "Enter a valid password in the password field",
        "Click the Login button"
      ],
      "expected": "An error message is shown for invalid username"
    },
    {
      "id": "LOGIN_04",
      "title": "Empty username and password",
      "type": "negative",
      "steps": [
        "Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/",
        "Leave the username field empty",
        "Leave the password field empty",
        "Click the Login button"
      ],
      "expected": "A validation error is shown"
    },
    {
      "id": "LOGIN_05",
      "title": "Locked user",
      "type": "negative",
      "steps": [
        "Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/",
        "Enter the username for a locked account in the username field",
        "Enter the corresponding password in the password field",
        "Click the Login button"
      ],
      "expected": "A \"locked user\" error message is shown"
    }
  ]
}
